title: Trilegal, AZB & Partners act on PMI Electro Mobility securing $310 million investment from KKR
description: KKR has made an investment of $310 million in PMI Electro Mobility, a manufacturer of e-buses); and Allfleet, a subsidiary of PMI that owns and operates e-bus concessions.Trilegal advised PMI Electro Mobility on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Nayantara Nag (Partner), Vaibhav Kothari (Partner), Aayush Kumar (Partner), Aparna Mehra (Partner), Shouri Bhat (Counsel), Arpita Chanana (Senior Associate) and Ravisha Seth (Senior Associate).Gautam Chawla (Partner), Madhav Kapoorthala
